official_name: Center for Financial Industry Information Systems
notes: Japanese non-profit body publishing FISC Security Guidelines for the financial industry — the dominant security framework for Japanese banks and financial institutions. Members-only / paid.

match_nodes.description: FISC Security Guidelines for Financial Institutions

data.official_name: FISC Security Guidelines on Computer Systems for Banking and Related Financial Institutions
data.notes: Members-only / paid. The dominant security framework for Japanese FIs; periodically revised.
